revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:風神, en:Fūjin); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/77616366 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:風神 | revid=77616366 --> ==Wikipedia:関連作品#掲載してよい記事の例関連== [[カイゲン]]、[[トルネロス]]等について[[Wikipedia:関連作品#掲載してよい記事の例]]関連での意見が記事中にコメントとしてありましたのでこちらに記しておきます[https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E9%A2%A8%E7%A5%9E&diff=prev&oldid=35200838]。 --[[特別:投稿記録/2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B|2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B]] 2020年5月19日 (火) 06:29 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==日本限定にならないように== 日本限定にならないようにという指摘が記事中にコメントとしてありましたのでこちらに記しておきます[https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E9%A2%A8%E7%A5%9E&diff=72630530&oldid=72129251]。恐らく[Category:日本の神]を付けることについてだと思われます（Japan-culture-stubについては、いずれにしろサイズ的にスタブでなくなったので、外しました）。 --[[特別:投稿記録/2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B|2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B]] 2020年5月19日 (火) 06:29 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199468119 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Fūjin | revid=1199468119 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=high}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }}
==This should be a disambig page. == Fujin is much more important in the context of Japanese mythology; multiple games/anime/manga, including Final Fantasy and Flame of Recca, have characters based on this name. In addition, various places in China are named Fujin.--[[User:Confuzion|Confuzion]] 19:40, 7 Sep 2004 (UTC)
Don't forget Zelda the Wind Waker, that had Raijin and Fujin in it. ^^
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==pictures== Why is there a random picture of other wind gods on this page? It seems not terribly relevant. The page is about Fujin, not about wind deities in general. [[User:Penelope D|Penelope D]] 14:27, 28 August 2005 (UTC) :Added some explanations on origins. [[User:PHG|PHG]] 22:17, 28 August 2005 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Video Games?? ==
I think the video-game stuff is completely over the top. If I want to read about an ancient deity, do I really want it to be on the same page as a description of the plot of a video game? I think not. I'd much prefer to see two separate pages on this.
It just seems inappropriate that there is more written here about video games than there is about the actual wind deity himself.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Origins. BCE? ==
Iconographical evolution of the Wind God. Left: Greek Wind God (Greco-Buddhist art of Gandhara), Hadda, 2nd century. Middle: Wind God from Kizil, Tarim Basin, 7th century. Right: Japanese Wind God Fujin, 17th century.
The photograph in the Origins section has the above caption. Shouldn't those dates be indicated to be BCE? I don't know the answer.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Encyclopedia Mythica ==
Part of this article seems to be copied from Encyclopedia Mythica's article on Fujin. [[User:Serasuna|Serasuna]] ([[User talk:Serasuna|talk]]) 18:54, 1 January 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Please do not make the legend of the fiction. ==
A legend of Japanese [[Buddhism]] states that Fūjin and [[Raijin]], the god of thunder, were both originally evil demons who opposed Buddha {{Citation needed|date=November 2009}}. They were captured in battle with Buddha's army of heaven, and have worked as gods since then{{Citation needed|date=September 2008}}. [[Special:Contributions/221.184.38.111|221.184.38.111]] ([[User talk:221.184.38.111|talk]]) 07:29, 12 May 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == creation of the world???? False information ==
He is said to have been present at the creation of the world and when he first let the winds out of his bag, they cleared the morning mists and filled the Gate between heaven and earth so the sun shone.
Where are sources of information? Such a tradition is not in Japan
http://www.nintendojo.com/features/specials/japanese-mythology-in-black-and-white This site uses a false source of information. [[Special:Contributions/60.40.8.219|60.40.8.219]] ([[User talk:60.40.8.219|talk]]) 20:09, 15 September 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Shinto Myth. Fuijin is written by Kojiki. ==
According to Kojiki, Fujin([[Shina-Tsu-Hiko]]) was born from [[Izanami]]. It is explained that it is the god of the wind(風神) by a commentary of Kojiki. [[Special:Contributions/221.185.253.158|221.185.253.158]] ([[User talk:221.185.253.158|talk]]) 08:44, 13 June 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:2601:249:187F:A0D0:5992:D218:DF24:C523]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=F%C5%ABjin here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=F%C5%ABjin for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/77616366 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:風神 | revid=77616366 --> ==Wikipedia:関連作品#掲載してよい記事の例関連== [[カイゲン]]、[[トルネロス]]等について[[Wikipedia:関連作品#掲載してよい記事の例]]関連での意見が記事中にコメントとしてありましたのでこちらに記しておきます[https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E9%A2%A8%E7%A5%9E&diff=prev&oldid=35200838]。 --[[特別:投稿記録/2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B|2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B]] 2020年5月19日 (火) 06:29 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==日本限定にならないように== 日本限定にならないようにという指摘が記事中にコメントとしてありましたのでこちらに記しておきます[https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%E9%A2%A8%E7%A5%9E&diff=72630530&oldid=72129251]。恐らく[Category:日本の神]を付けることについてだと思われます（Japan-culture-stubについては、いずれにしろサイズ的にスタブでなくなったので、外しました）。 --[[特別:投稿記録/2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B|2001:240:241C:D85C:2DAB:1954:7CA0:C65B]] 2020年5月19日 (火) 06:29 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199468119 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Fūjin | revid=1199468119 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=high}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }}
==This should be a disambig page. == Fujin is much more important in the context of Japanese mythology; multiple games/anime/manga, including Final Fantasy and Flame of Recca, have characters based on this name. In addition, various places in China are named Fujin.--[[User:Confuzion|Confuzion]] 19:40, 7 Sep 2004 (UTC)
Don't forget Zelda the Wind Waker, that had Raijin and Fujin in it. ^^
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==pictures== Why is there a random picture of other wind gods on this page? It seems not terribly relevant. The page is about Fujin, not about wind deities in general. [[User:Penelope D|Penelope D]] 14:27, 28 August 2005 (UTC) :Added some explanations on origins. [[User:PHG|PHG]] 22:17, 28 August 2005 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Video Games?? ==
I think the video-game stuff is completely over the top. If I want to read about an ancient deity, do I really want it to be on the same page as a description of the plot of a video game? I think not. I'd much prefer to see two separate pages on this.
It just seems inappropriate that there is more written here about video games than there is about the actual wind deity himself.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Origins. BCE? ==
Iconographical evolution of the Wind God. Left: Greek Wind God (Greco-Buddhist art of Gandhara), Hadda, 2nd century. Middle: Wind God from Kizil, Tarim Basin, 7th century. Right: Japanese Wind God Fujin, 17th century.
The photograph in the Origins section has the above caption. Shouldn't those dates be indicated to be BCE? I don't know the answer.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Encyclopedia Mythica ==
Part of this article seems to be copied from Encyclopedia Mythica's article on Fujin. [[User:Serasuna|Serasuna]] ([[User talk:Serasuna|talk]]) 18:54, 1 January 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Please do not make the legend of the fiction. ==
A legend of Japanese [[Buddhism]] states that Fūjin and [[Raijin]], the god of thunder, were both originally evil demons who opposed Buddha {{Citation needed|date=November 2009}}. They were captured in battle with Buddha's army of heaven, and have worked as gods since then{{Citation needed|date=September 2008}}. [[Special:Contributions/221.184.38.111|221.184.38.111]] ([[User talk:221.184.38.111|talk]]) 07:29, 12 May 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == creation of the world???? False information ==
He is said to have been present at the creation of the world and when he first let the winds out of his bag, they cleared the morning mists and filled the Gate between heaven and earth so the sun shone.
Where are sources of information? Such a tradition is not in Japan
http://www.nintendojo.com/features/specials/japanese-mythology-in-black-and-white This site uses a false source of information. [[Special:Contributions/60.40.8.219|60.40.8.219]] ([[User talk:60.40.8.219|talk]]) 20:09, 15 September 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Shinto Myth. Fuijin is written by Kojiki. ==
According to Kojiki, Fujin([[Shina-Tsu-Hiko]]) was born from [[Izanami]]. It is explained that it is the god of the wind(風神) by a commentary of Kojiki. [[Special:Contributions/221.185.253.158|221.185.253.158]] ([[User talk:221.185.253.158|talk]]) 08:44, 13 June 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:36, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
